lea:title: The Pitch Science Fiction 2025
lea:author: Eduard Pech
lea:description: The Pitch Science Fiction is a quarterly publication of science fiction stories by various authors, covering diverse themes. Included in this issue: Table Of Contents Plain
lea:rights: All texts and illustrations not explicitly declared as being in the public domain are copyright 2025 by Eduard Pech or by their respective authors. The complete edition is copyright 2025 by Logophilia. Logophilia is an imprint of Logophilia OÜ.
lea:text: About the Content.xhtml

Table of Contents by Blurbs.xhtml
Table of Contents by Era.xhtml
The Snowball Effect by Katherine MacLean.xhtml
Missing Link by Frank Herbert.xhtml
The Marching Morons by C. M. Kornbluth.xhtml
Anthem by Ayn Rand.xhtml
The Life Watch by Lester del Rey.xhtml
The Wounded by Philip Jose Farmer.xhtml
The Expendables by A. E. van Vogt.xhtml
Metropolis by Thea von Harbou.xhtml
The Voice of the Void by John W. Campbell, Jr..xhtml
Zero Hour by Ray Bradbury.xhtml
Transcendence by Idoru Toei.xhtml
Watchbird by Robert Sheckley.xhtml
A Martian Odyssey by Stanley G. Weinbaum.xhtml
The Time Machine by H. G. Wells.xhtml
Despoilers of the Golden Empire by Randall Garrett.xhtml
Industrial Revolution by Poul Anderson.xhtml
ARMAGEDDON 2419 AD by Philip Francis Nowlan.xhtml
Mr. Spaceship by Philip K. Dick.xhtml
This Crowded Earth by Robert Bloch.xhtml
Pillar of Fire by Ray Bradbury.xhtml
Plague Ship by Andre Norton.xhtml
The Celestial Blueprint by Philip Jose Farmer.xhtml
Deathworld by Harry Harrison.xhtml
Valley of Dreams by Stanley G. Weinbaum.xhtml
Hubris by Idoru Toei.xhtml
Security by Poul Anderson.xhtml
The Legion of Lazarus by Edmond Hamilton.xhtml
Omnilingual by H. Beam Piper.xhtml
The Magnificent Possession by Isaac Asimov.xhtml
The Variable Man by Philip K. Dick.xhtml
The Status Civilization by Robert Sheckley.xhtml
Gambler's World by Keith Laumer.xhtml
Arm of the Law by Harry Harrison.xhtml
The World That Couldn't Be by Clifford D. Simak.xhtml
M2 by Daria Skrinitsa.xhtml
Islands of Space by John W. Campbell, Jr..xhtml
A Question of Courage by Jesse F. Bone.xhtml
The Sensitive Man by Poul Anderson.xhtml
The Memory of Mars by Raymond F. Jones.xhtml
Let 'Em Breathe Space by Lester del Rey.xhtml
The Eyes Have It by Randall Garrett.xhtml
